surface: React Notice Checklist legal readiness proof chain

in_app_browser_checks.success_state: DOM showed Legal readiness proof chain, Legal gate copy, Immutable audit hash visible, and 0 console errors.
in_app_browser_checks.blocked_state: After selecting Planning Commission - Special Session, DOM showed Cannot proceed, Statutory notice is blocked for this meeting, Deadline missed, and the reschedule/lawful-emergency fix path with 0 console errors.

keyboard_focus_review: The proof-chain cards are non-interactive status content; action controls remain native buttons, inputs, textareas, and selects with existing visible focus styling.
contrast_review: Blocked notice surfaces use red text on pale red panels, passed gates use green badges, and the legal callout uses dark brown text on cream/orange panels with readable contrast.
copy_review: The workspace now explains that notice is a statutory public-notice proof record, names each required gate, states why posting proof is disabled when the deadline is missed, and gives the clerk a safe fix path.
